docs.purpose: Project directory, module, and important-file map.
docs.readWhen: Before structural changes or broad feature work.
docs.updateTrigger: Directories, entry points, modules, or important files change.

docs.purpose: Current plan, next actions, risks, and milestones.
docs.updateTrigger: Plans, priorities, milestones, or risks change.
docs.validation: Next actions are current and actionable.

docs.updateTrigger: New recurring issue or resolved issue.

docs.validation: Entries link to relevant docs or files.

docs.updateTrigger: Debt is found, resolved, or reprioritized.

docs.purpose: Project memory evidence and invalidation rules.
docs.readWhen: Before adding evidence, source hashes, retrieval records, or invalidations.
docs.updateTrigger: Evidence schema, retrieval index, or invalidation policy changes.
docs.validation: Evidence JSONL and invalidation JSONL parse correctly.

docs.readWhen: Before summarizing or routing project memory reads.
docs.updateTrigger: Durable docs, summaries, or memory routes change.
docs.validation: JSON parses and paths exist or are marked missing.

docs.purpose: Project memory maintenance setup and safety policy.
docs.readWhen: Before changing project maintenance hooks or schedules.
docs.updateTrigger: Maintenance setup, hook policy, or schedule assumptions change.
docs.validation: JSON parses and setup remains idempotent.

docs.purpose: Evidence records for durable project memory and KG entries.
docs.updateTrigger: New durable memory or KG evidence is recorded.
docs.validation: Each non-empty line is valid JSON with required fields.

docs.updateTrigger: Project facts, graph nodes, docs, APIs, or modules are superseded.
docs.validation: Each non-empty line is valid JSON with required fields.

entries.validation: Each non-empty line is valid JSON with required fields.

entries.updateTrigger: Project facts, graph nodes, docs, APIs, or modules are superseded.
